_comment: Atlas Vector Search index definition. Create this ONCE in the Atlas UI (Atlas Search -> Create Search Index -> JSON Editor) on database `peoples_priorities`, collection `issueclusters`. Index name must match ATLAS_VECTOR_INDEX in .env (default: cluster_vector_index). IMPORTANT: numDimensions must match EMBEDDING_DIM in .env - 768 for gemini-embedding-001 (default, MRL-truncated + app-normalized). Also update backend/scripts/embed_guidance.py's DIM if you change this.
